data.name: SD_DIA
data.value:
SELECT O1."BD" AS "BaseDeDatos", O1."EMPRESA" AS "Empresa", O1."Cuenta", O1."NombreCuenta", CAST(O1."INGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Ingreso", CAST(O1."EGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Egreso", CAST(O1."SALDO DIARIO" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoDiario", CAST(O1."SALDO INICIAL" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoInicial", CAST(CAST('{0}' AS DATE) AS VARCHAR) AS "Fecha" FROM ( --<INICIO SAN NICOLAS> SELECT 'SBOSANNICOLAS' AS "BD",'GOVI SAN NICOLAS S DE RL DE CV' AS "EMPRESA", SN1."Cuenta" ,SN1."NombreCuenta", CAST(SUM (SN1."Ingresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "INGRESO", CAST(SUM (SN1."Egresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "EGRESO", CAST ((SUM (SN1."Ingresos") - SUM (SN1."Egresos")) + IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = SN1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO DIARIO", CAST(IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = SN1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO INICIAL", '{0}' AS "FECHA" FROM ( select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOSANNICOLAS_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' AND ifnull("Ingresos",0) <> 0 UNION ALL select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOSANNICOLAS_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Descripcion" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%P TER%' and "Concepto" not like '%P TER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and "Concepto" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and ifnull("Ingresos",0) = 0 ) SN1 WHERE SN1."Cuenta" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SN1."Cuenta" ,SN1."NombreCuenta" --<FIN SAN NICOLAS> )O1
UNION ALL
SELECT O1."BD" AS "BaseDeDatos", O1."EMPRESA" AS "Empresa", O1."Cuenta", O1."NombreCuenta", CAST(O1."INGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Ingreso", CAST(O1."EGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Egreso", CAST(O1."SALDO DIARIO" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoDiario", CAST(O1."SALDO INICIAL" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoInicial", CAST(CAST('{0}' AS DATE) AS VARCHAR) AS "Fecha" FROM ( --<INICIO SBOSUSPGR> SELECT 'SBOSUSPGR' AS "BD",'SUSPENSIONES GR , S DE RL DE CV' AS "EMPRESA", GR1."Cuenta" ,GR1."NombreCuenta", CAST(SUM (GR1."Ingresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "INGRESO", CAST(SUM (GR1."Egresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "EGRESO", CAST ((SUM (GR1."Ingresos") - SUM (GR1."Egresos")) + IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = GR1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO DIARIO", CAST(IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = GR1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO INICIAL", '{0}' AS "FECHA" FROM ( select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOSUSPGR_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' AND ifnull("Ingresos",0) <> 0 UNION ALL select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOSUSPGR_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Descripcion" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%P TER%' and "Concepto" not like '%P TER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and "Concepto" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and ifnull("Ingresos",0) = 0 ) GR1 WHERE GR1."Cuenta" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY GR1."Cuenta" ,GR1."NombreCuenta" --<FIN SBOSUSPGR> )O1
UNION ALL
SELECT O1."BD" AS "BaseDeDatos", O1."EMPRESA" AS "Empresa", O1."Cuenta", O1."NombreCuenta", CAST(O1."INGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Ingreso", CAST(O1."EGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Egreso", CAST(O1."SALDO DIARIO" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoDiario", CAST(O1."SALDO INICIAL" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoInicial", CAST(CAST('{0}' AS DATE) AS VARCHAR) AS "Fecha" FROM ( --<INICIO CHAPULTEPEC> SELECT 'SBOCHAPULTEPEC' AS "BD",'GOVI CHAPULTEPEC SA DE CV' AS "EMPRESA", CH1."Cuenta" ,CH1."NombreCuenta", CAST(SUM (CH1."Ingresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "INGRESO", CAST(SUM (CH1."Egresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "EGRESO", CAST ((SUM (CH1."Ingresos") - SUM (CH1."Egresos")) + IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = CH1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO DIARIO", CAST(IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = CH1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO INICIAL", '{0}' AS "FECHA" FROM ( select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOCHAPULTEPEC_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' AND ifnull("Ingresos",0) <> 0 UNION ALL select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOCHAPULTEPEC_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Descripcion" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%P TER%' and "Concepto" not like '%P TER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and "Concepto" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and ifnull("Ingresos",0) = 0 ) CH1 WHERE CH1."Cuenta" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CH1."Cuenta" ,CH1."NombreCuenta" --<FIN CHAPULTEPEC> )O1
UNION ALL
SELECT O1."BD" AS "BaseDeDatos", O1."EMPRESA" AS "Empresa", O1."Cuenta", O1."NombreCuenta", CAST(O1."INGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Ingreso", CAST(O1."EGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Egreso", CAST(O1."SALDO DIARIO" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoDiario", CAST(O1."SALDO INICIAL" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoInicial", CAST(CAST('{0}' AS DATE) AS VARCHAR) AS "Fecha" FROM ( --<INICIO GOVI REFACCIONARIA> SELECT 'SBOGOVI' AS "BD",'GOVI REFACCIONARIA SA DE CV' AS "EMPRESA", RE1."Cuenta" ,RE1."NombreCuenta", CAST(SUM (RE1."Ingresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "INGRESO", CAST(SUM (RE1."Egresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "EGRESO", CAST ((SUM (RE1."Ingresos") - SUM (RE1."Egresos")) + IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = RE1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO DIARIO", CAST(IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = RE1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO INICIAL", '{0}' AS "FECHA" FROM ( select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIOSBOGOVIREP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' AND ifnull("Ingresos",0) <> 0 UNION ALL select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIOSBOGOVIREP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Descripcion" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%P TER%' and "Concepto" not like '%P TER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and "Concepto" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and ifnull("Ingresos",0) = 0 ) RE1 WHERE RE1."Cuenta" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY RE1."Cuenta" ,RE1."NombreCuenta" --<INICIO GOVI REFACCIONARIA> )O1
UNION ALL
SELECT O1."BD" AS "BaseDeDatos", O1."EMPRESA" AS "Empresa", O1."Cuenta", O1."NombreCuenta", CAST(O1."INGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Ingreso", CAST(O1."EGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Egreso", CAST(O1."SALDO DIARIO" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoDiario", CAST(O1."SALDO INICIAL" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoInicial", CAST(CAST('{0}' AS DATE) AS VARCHAR) AS "Fecha" FROM ( --<INICIO SBOLAFE> SELECT 'SBOLAFE' AS "BD",'GOVI LA FE S DE RL DE CV' AS "EMPRESA", LF1."Cuenta" ,LF1."NombreCuenta", CAST(SUM (LF1."Ingresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "INGRESO", CAST(SUM (LF1."Egresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "EGRESO", CAST ((SUM (LF1."Ingresos") - SUM (LF1."Egresos")) + IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = LF1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO DIARIO", CAST(IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = LF1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO INICIAL", '{0}' AS "FECHA" FROM ( select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOLAFE_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' AND ifnull("Ingresos",0) <> 0 UNION ALL select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOLAFE_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Descripcion" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%P TER%' and "Concepto" not like '%P TER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and "Concepto" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and ifnull("Ingresos",0) = 0 ) LF1 WHERE LF1."Cuenta" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY LF1."Cuenta" ,LF1."NombreCuenta" --<FIN SBOLAFE> )O1
UNION ALL
SELECT O1."BD" AS "BaseDeDatos", O1."EMPRESA" AS "Empresa", O1."Cuenta", O1."NombreCuenta", CAST(O1."INGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Ingreso", CAST(O1."EGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Egreso", CAST(O1."SALDO DIARIO" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoDiario", CAST(O1."SALDO INICIAL" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoInicial", CAST(CAST('{0}' AS DATE) AS VARCHAR) AS "Fecha" FROM ( --<INICIO SBOGOVISUSPEN> SELECT 'SBOGOVISUSPEN' AS "BD",'GOVI SUSPENSION AUTOMOTRIZ S. DE R.L. DE C.V.' AS "EMPRESA", SU1."Cuenta" ,SU1."NombreCuenta", CAST(SUM (SU1."Ingresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "INGRESO", CAST(SUM (SU1."Egresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "EGRESO", CAST ((SUM (SU1."Ingresos") - SUM (SU1."Egresos")) + IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = SU1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO DIARIO", CAST(IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = SU1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO INICIAL", '{0}' AS "FECHA" FROM ( select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOGOVISUSPEN_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' AND ifnull("Ingresos",0) <> 0 UNION ALL select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOGOVISUSPEN_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Descripcion" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%P TER%' and "Concepto" not like '%P TER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and "Concepto" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and ifnull("Ingresos",0) = 0 ) SU1 WHERE SU1."Cuenta" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SU1."Cuenta" ,SU1."NombreCuenta" --<FIN SBOGOVISUSPEN> )O1
UNION ALL
SELECT O1."BD" AS "BaseDeDatos", O1."EMPRESA" AS "Empresa", O1."Cuenta", O1."NombreCuenta", CAST(O1."INGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Ingreso", CAST(O1."EGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Egreso", CAST(O1."SALDO DIARIO" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoDiario", CAST(O1."SALDO INICIAL" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoInicial", CAST(CAST('{0}' AS DATE) AS VARCHAR) AS "Fecha" FROM ( --<INICIO SBOGROBSUSP> SELECT 'SBOGROBSUSP' AS "BD",'GROB SUSPENSION AUTOMOTRIZ S DE RL DE CV' AS "EMPRESA", GB1."Cuenta" ,GB1."NombreCuenta", CAST(SUM (GB1."Ingresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "INGRESO", CAST(SUM (GB1."Egresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "EGRESO", CAST ((SUM (GB1."Ingresos") - SUM (GB1."Egresos")) + IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = GB1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO DIARIO", CAST(IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = GB1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO INICIAL", '{0}' AS "FECHA" FROM ( select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOGROBSUSP_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' AND ifnull("Ingresos",0) <> 0 UNION ALL select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOGROBSUSP_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Descripcion" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%P TER%' and "Concepto" not like '%P TER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and "Concepto" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and ifnull("Ingresos",0) = 0 ) GB1 WHERE GB1."Cuenta" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY GB1."Cuenta" ,GB1."NombreCuenta" --<FIN SBOGROBSUSP> )O1
UNION ALL
SELECT O1."BD" AS "BaseDeDatos", O1."EMPRESA" AS "Empresa", O1."Cuenta", O1."NombreCuenta", CAST(O1."INGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Ingreso", CAST(O1."EGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Egreso", CAST(O1."SALDO DIARIO" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoDiario", CAST(O1."SALDO INICIAL" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoInicial", CAST(CAST('{0}' AS DATE) AS VARCHAR) AS "Fecha" FROM ( --<INICIO SBOGOVI2> SELECT 'SBOGOVI2' AS "BD",'REFACCIONARIA GOVI NO 2 SA DE CV' AS "EMPRESA", RE2."Cuenta" ,RE2."NombreCuenta", CAST(SUM (RE2."Ingresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "INGRESO", CAST(SUM (RE2."Egresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "EGRESO", CAST ((SUM (RE2."Ingresos") - SUM (RE2."Egresos")) + IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = RE2."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO DIARIO", CAST(IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = RE2."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO INICIAL", '{0}' AS "FECHA" FROM ( select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOGOVI2_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' AND ifnull("Ingresos",0) <> 0 UNION ALL select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOGOVI2_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Descripcion" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%P TER%' and "Concepto" not like '%P TER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and "Concepto" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and ifnull("Ingresos",0) = 0 ) RE2 WHERE RE2."Cuenta" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY RE2."Cuenta" ,RE2."NombreCuenta" --<FIN SBOGOVI2> )O1
UNION ALL
SELECT O1."BD" AS "BaseDeDatos", O1."EMPRESA" AS "Empresa", O1."Cuenta", O1."NombreCuenta", CAST(O1."INGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Ingreso", CAST(O1."EGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Egreso", CAST(O1."SALDO DIARIO" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoDiario", CAST(O1."SALDO INICIAL" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoInicial", CAST(CAST('{0}' AS DATE) AS VARCHAR) AS "Fecha" FROM ( --<INICIO SBOSERVINM> SELECT 'SBOSERVINM' AS "BD",'SERVICIOS INMOBILIARIOS' AS "EMPRESA", IN1."Cuenta" ,IN1."NombreCuenta", CAST(SUM (IN1."Ingresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "INGRESO", CAST(SUM (IN1."Egresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "EGRESO", CAST ((SUM (IN1."Ingresos") - SUM (IN1."Egresos")) + IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = IN1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO DIARIO", CAST(IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = IN1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO INICIAL", '{0}' AS "FECHA" FROM ( select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOSERVINM_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' AND ifnull("Ingresos",0) <> 0 UNION ALL select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOSERVINM_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Descripcion" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%P TER%' and "Concepto" not like '%P TER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and "Concepto" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and ifnull("Ingresos",0) = 0 ) IN1 WHERE IN1."Cuenta" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY IN1."Cuenta" ,IN1."NombreCuenta" --<FIN SBOSERVINM> )O1 UNION ALL SELECT O1."BD" AS "BaseDeDatos", O1."EMPRESA" AS "Empresa", O1."Cuenta", O1."NombreCuenta", CAST(O1."INGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Ingreso", CAST(O1."EGRESO" AS DECIMAL) AS "Egreso", CAST(O1."SALDO DIARIO" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoDiario", CAST(O1."SALDO INICIAL" AS DECIMAL) AS "SaldoInicial", CAST(CAST('{0}' AS DATE) AS VARCHAR) AS "Fecha" FROM ( --<INICIO SBOAUTOMOTIVE> SELECT 'SBOAUTOMOTIVE' AS "BD",'GOVI SUSPENSION AUTOMOTIVE' AS "EMPRESA", IN1."Cuenta" ,IN1."NombreCuenta", CAST(SUM (IN1."Ingresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "INGRESO", CAST(SUM (IN1."Egresos") AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "EGRESO", CAST ((SUM (IN1."Ingresos") - SUM (IN1."Egresos")) + IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = IN1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO DIARIO", CAST(IFNULL((SELECT IFNULL("SALDODIARIO",0) FROM "STS_GROB"."PortalGROB.oTables::TEMP_SALDOS_INICIALES" WHERE "CUENTA" = IN1."Cuenta"),0) AS NUMERIC(19,2)) AS "SALDO INICIAL", '{0}' AS "FECHA" FROM ( select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOAUTOMOTIVE_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' AND ifnull("Ingresos",0) <> 0 UNION ALL select "Cuenta", "NombreCuenta", "Fecha", ifnull("Ingresos",0) as "Ingresos", ifnull("Egresos",0) as "Egresos", ifnull("Saldo",0) as "Saldo" from "_SYS_BIC"."PortalGROB.Reportes/SALDODIARIO_SBOAUTOMOTIVE_REP" where "Fecha" between '20190201' and '{0}' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Concepto" not like '%CHEQ%' and "Descripcion" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Concepto" not like '%DEV.CHEQUE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCEROS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPEI%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRANSF ELECTRONICA FONDOS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA-IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO DE SUA IMSS%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO REFERENCIADO%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Concepto" not like '%CARGO POR PAGO CONCENTRACIÓN%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CUENTA DE TERCE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPE%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Concepto" not like '%CORRECCION%' and "Descripcion" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%PAGO A CUENTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Concepto" not like '%TRASPASO A CTA%' and "Descripcion" not like '%P TER%' and "Concepto" not like '%P TER%' and "Descripcion" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Concepto" not like '%COMPRA ORDEN DE PAGO SPID%' and "Descripcion" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and "Concepto" not like '%CERTIFICA.CHQ.%' and ifnull("Ingresos",0) = 0 ) IN1 WHERE IN1."Cuenta" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY IN1."Cuenta" ,IN1."NombreCuenta" --<FIN SBOAUTOMOTIVE> )O1;

data.name: SQL_TRANSFERENCIAS
data.value: SELECT "Sociedad", "VATRegNum", "BankCtlKey", "MandateID", "Account", "DflAccount", "DocTotal", "DocNum", IFNULL("JrnlMemo", '') AS "JrnlMemo", "County", "LicTradNum", "IVA", IFNULL(LEFT("E_Mail",39), '') AS "E_Mail", "DocDate", "CardName", "DocEntry", "BPLName", "GLAccount" FROM "_SYS_BIC"."ProductivaGOVI/DispersionUaU" AS "OVPM" {0}

data.name: SQL_TRANSFERENCIAS_SERVICIOS
data.value: SELECT "Sociedad", "VATRegNum", "BankCtlKey", -- FORPAG "MandateID", -- CVESER "Account", -- CTAABO "DflAccount", -- IMPORTE "DocTotal", "DocNum", "JrnlMemo", "County", "LicTradNum", "IVA", "E_Mail", -- CORREO ELECTRÓNICO "DocDate", "CardName", "DocNum2", "DocEntry", "BPLName", "GLAccount", "REF01", "REF02", "REF03", "REF04", "REF05", "REF06", "FILLER", "FECVEN" FROM "_SYS_BIC"."ProductivaGOVI/DispersionServicios"
